src: Any Agent × Any Provider × Anywhere. Connect Cursor, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Codex to Slack, Telegram, Discord, Feishu, DingTalk, WeCom, WeChat — with any LLM provider.
ja: Any Agent × Any Provider × Anywhere. Cursor、Claude Code、OpenCode、CodexをSlack、Telegram、Discord、Feishu、DingTalk、WeCom、WeChatに接続 — 任意のLLMプロバイダーで。
